hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_response.filePath // .tool_input.file_path // empty'); [ -z "$f" ] && exit 0; case "$f" in *.py) command -v ruff >/dev/null 2>&1 && ruff format "$f" >/dev/null 2>&1 && ruff check --fix "$f" >/dev/null 2>&1 ;; *apps/web/*) [ -x apps/web/node_modules/.bin/prettier ] && apps/web/node_modules/.bin/prettier --write --ignore-unknown "$f" >/dev/null 2>&1 ;; esac; true
